title: 'Two lasers, one box, zero compromise for pro-grade engraving': The xTool F2 Ultra is $1,000 off at Amazon…
excerpt: The tool can tackle demanding engraving, embossing, and metalworking
content_html:
Built for professional makers, workshops, and small businesses, the xTool F2 Ultra industrial-grade desktop laser engraver is currently selling for $3,998.99 at Amazon, down from its $4,999 list price.

It features a powerful 60W MOPA (Master Oscillator Power Amplifier) fiber laser capable of deep engraving, 3D embossing, color engraving, and cutting metal up to 2mm thick. It also supports black marking on aluminum, laser cleaning, thin metal welding, and works with stainless steel, titanium, brass, gold, silver, and more.

Should you buy it?

✅ Buy the xTool F2 Ultra if...

This machine is designed for anyone producing custom products, industrial parts, jewelry, signage, or personalized gifts. It engraves at speeds up to 15,000mm/s, offers an 8.7 x 8.7-inch working area that can be expanded with an optional conveyor, and uses dual 48MP AI cameras to improve positioning accuracy to 0.2mm while automatically detecting materials and suggesting settings.

❌ Skip the xTool F2 Ultra if...

The F2 Ultra is far more machine than most hobbyists need. Its nearly $4,000 sale price remains a major investment, it requires space to operate safely, and as a Class 4 laser engraver it demands appropriate eye protection and safe working practices. If you only engrave occasionally or mainly work with wood and acrylic, a less powerful system may offer better value.

Why we recommend it

Few desktop fiber laser engravers combine this level of power, speed, and automation. The ability to produce more than 100 consistent colors on metal, perform deep engraving and embossing, and streamline setup with AI-assisted cameras makes it a capable tool for businesses looking to increase productivity while keeping high-quality results.

In his review, our expert Alastair said: "The xTool F2 Ultra is far removed from many consumer-grade machines, with a high-end product-designed enclosure and streamlined user interface that make this one of the most powerful and easy-to-use machines of its type on the market."

Price Context & Historical Value

A $1,000 discount represents a solid saving on professional equipment, and the cheapest we've seen the xTool F2 Ultra selling for to date. It remains a premium purchase, but this price cut will make it considerably more accessible for professionals who were already planning to invest in a high-end fiber laser engraver.

The Catch: What to know before you buy

This deal covers the single 60W MOPA fiber laser model only. Accessories including the automatic conveyor are sold separately, and you'll need suitable ventilation, a dedicated workspace, and proper laser safety precautions before putting this Class 4 engraver into regular use.

  • Shop all craft cutting tools at Amazon

Wayne Williams is a freelancer writing news for TechRadar Pro. He has been writing about computers, technology, and the web for 30 years. In that time he wrote for most of the UK’s PC magazines, and launched, edited and published a number of them too.

content_html_zh:
xTool F2 Ultra 工业级桌面激光雕刻机专为专业制造商、车间和小型企业打造，目前在亚马逊的售价为 3,998.99 美元，低于其 4,999 美元的标价。

它配备强大的 60W MOPA（主振荡器功率放大器）光纤激光器，能够进行深度雕刻、3D 浮雕、彩色雕刻和切割厚达 2 毫米的金属。 它还支持铝上的黑色打标、激光清洁、薄金属焊接，并适用于不锈钢、钛​​、黄铜、金、银等。

你应该买吗？

✅ 购买 xTool F2 Ultra 如果...

该机器专为生产定制产品、工业零件、珠宝、标牌或个性化礼品的任何人而设计。 它的雕刻速度高达 15,000 毫米/秒，提供 8.7 x 8.7 英寸的工作区域，可通过可选的传送带进行扩展，并使用双 48MP AI 摄像头将定位精度提高至 0.2 毫米，同时自动检测材料并建议设置。

❌ 如果...请跳过 xTool F2 Ultra

F2 Ultra 的机械性能远超大多数爱好者的需求。 其近 4,000 美元的售价仍然是一项重大投资，它需要安全操作的空间，并且作为 4 级激光雕刻机，它需要适当的眼睛保护和安全的工作实践。 如果您只是偶尔雕刻或主要使用木材和丙烯酸树脂，则功能较弱的系统可能会提供更好的价值。

为什么我们推荐它

很少有桌面光纤激光雕刻机能够将这种功率、速度和自动化水平结合在一起。 它能够在金属上产生 100 多种一致的颜色，进行深度雕刻和压花，并通过 AI 辅助相机简化设置，使其成为寻求提高生产力同时保持高质量结果的企业的强大工具。

我们的专家 Alastair 在评论中表示：“xTool F2 Ultra 与许多消费级机器截然不同，它具有高端产品设计的外壳和简化的用户界面，使其成为市场上同类机器中功能最强大且易于使用的机器之一。”

价格背景和历史价值

1,000 美元的折扣意味着专业设备的大幅节省，也是迄今为止我们所见过的最便宜的 xTool F2 Ultra。 它仍然是一个溢价购买，但这次降价将使那些已经计划投资高端光纤激光雕刻机的专业人士更容易获得它。

要点：购买前要了解什么

该交易仅涵盖单个 60W MOPA 光纤激光器型号。 包括自动传送带在内的配件单独出售，在常规使用这款 4 级雕刻机之前，您需要适当的通风、专用的工作空间和适当的激光安全预防措施。

  • 在亚马逊购买所有工艺切割工具

Wayne Williams 是一名自由职业者，为 TechRadar Pro 撰写新闻。 30 年来，他一直在撰写有关计算机、技术和网络的文章。 在那段时间，他为英国大部分 PC 杂志撰稿，并创办、编辑和出版了其中一些杂志。
